posts.author: joycewong (Joyce Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When we create a form for a board, instead of a form field being entered into the respective column, the input is placed into the item updates.

What are you trying to achieve

When there are long text responses in a form field, it is very hard to read in a board column. If that text can be automatically placed into the item update, it would be much easier to read.
